basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India FLCC Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India has released the official FLCC Counsellor Notification 2026 on 08.05.2026 at Central Bank of India centralbank.bank.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the Central Bank of India FLCC Counsellor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 45 to 65 years with a Graduate degree in any discipline can apply offline from 08.05.2026 to 20.05.2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from recognised university. Computer literate, Proficient in basis knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language. Excellent communication skill in local language is essential. Retired/VRS opted Bank Officials of Scale I and above of Nationalised Bank including State Bank of India and RRBs preferred. Ex-Service man or/and other than Bank Employees (e.g. Government School Teacher etc.) having Banking knowledge and knowledge of financial services & having completed relevant IIBF certification course. Applicant should have unblemished service record and possess Service Certificate from the previous employer with Experience as an Officer/permanent employee of 10 years.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25000/- per month + Rs. 1000/- per month for conveyance including mobile
salary_details.details: Remuneration: Rs.25000/- per month Conveyance including Mobile: Rs.1000/- per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20 May 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the FLCC Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the FLCC Counsellor post is 20 May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Additionally, computer literacy, proficiency in MS Office, internet, and local language typing are essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the FLCC Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the FLCC Counsellor post is between 45 years and 65 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, so refer to the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the FLCC Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a remuneration of Rs. 25,000/- per month, along with Rs. 1,000/- per month for conveyance, including mobile expenses.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the FLCC Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the FLCC Counsellor post, with one position in Ratlam and another in Mandsaur.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any preference for retired bank officials?
faq.answer: Yes, retired or VRS opted Bank Officials of Scale I and above from Nationalised Banks, including State Bank of India and RRBs, are preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the FLCC Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The FLCC Counsellor position is on a contract basis for a period of one year.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential skills required for the FLCC Counsellor role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include computer literacy, proficiency in MS Office, internet usage, typing in the local language, and excellent communication skills in the local language.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Central Bank of India's official website. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
